executionValidation: Every Git code_input uses fixedLanguage bash, recipeType shell_task, and mode terminal_workspace.
Every repository task includes gitExpectations or a generated hiddenShellCheck derived from gitExpectations.
Do not use terminal command history as the only proof that repository state is correct.
Use workspaceExpectations for ordinary file fixtures and gitExpectations for repository semantics.
Do not require Judge0 for Git terminal-workspace checks.
determinism: Configure ZoeSkoul Learner and learner@zoeskoul.local locally before commits.
Set main explicitly whenever the default branch matters.
Never compare exact commit hashes or uncontrolled dates.
Seed all merge conflicts and collaborator updates deterministically.
Use local bare repositories for origin and remote-tracking exercises.
pedagogy: Keep lessons repository-state-first rather than command-list-first.
Use a different scenario for worked examples, Try It, module projects, and capstones.
Tell the learner to press Enter in every terminal prompt.
